description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring .gitignore and README.rst files. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-package, lint, unit-test, run-coverage, and upload-coverage. Each job runs in a container with a Python 3.11 image, except unit-test and run-coverage which use a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions and operating systems. The workflow performs tasks such as building, linting, unit testing, running coverage tests, and uploading coverage reports to Coveralls.
